mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name, u.username AS email, u.nickname, tp.phone, u.profile_img AS profileImg, tp.bio, tp.headline, tp.self_intro AS selfIntro, tp.video_url AS videoUrl, tp.default_zoom_url AS defaultZoomUrl, tp.bank_name AS bankName, tp.account_number AS accountNumber, tp.account_holder AS accountHolder, tp.rating_avg AS ratingAvg, tp.review_count AS reviewCount FROM tutor_profile tp JOIN users u ON tp.user_id = u.id WHERE tp.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT lf.id, lf.name, lf.category, tf.seq FROM tutor_field tf JOIN language_field lf ON tf.field_id = lf.id WHERE tf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tf.seq

SELECT b.id AS bookingId, l.id AS lessonId, u.id AS studentId, u.name AS studentName, l.title AS subject, ta.start_at AS startAt, ta.end_at AS endAt, CASE WHEN b.canceled_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN b.done_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN b.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS status, (l.price * GREATEST(1, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ta.start_at, ta.end_at) / 30)) AS price, COALESCE(b.paid_at, p.paid_at) AS paidAt FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT booking_id, MAX(paid_at) AS paid_at FROM payment WHERE status = 'PAID' GROUP BY booking_id ) p ON p.booking_id = b.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND ta.start_at >= NOW() AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.done_at IS NULL ORDER BY ta.start_at ASC

SELECT b.id AS bookingId, l.id AS lessonId, u.id AS studentId, u.name AS studentName, l.title AS subject, ta.start_at AS startAt, ta.end_at AS endAt, CASE WHEN b.canceled_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN b.done_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN b.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS status, (l.price * GREATEST(1, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ta.start_at, ta.end_at) / 30)) AS price, COALESCE(b.paid_at, p.paid_at) AS paidAt FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT booking_id, MAX(paid_at) AS paid_at FROM payment WHERE status = 'PAID' GROUP BY booking_id ) p ON p.booking_id = b.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND (ta.start_at < NOW() OR b.done_at IS NOT NULL OR b.canceled_at IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY ta.start_at DESC

SELECT r.id AS reviewId, b.id AS bookingId, u.id AS studentId, u.name AS studentName, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.done_at IS NOT NULL) AS totalLessons, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(p.amount) FROM payment p JOIN booking b ON p.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PAID'), 0) AS totalEarnings, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_id) FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL) AS activeStudents, NULL AS hourlyRate, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId}), 0) AS ratingAvg, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId}) AS reviewCount

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%Y-%m') AS yearMonth, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS lessonCount, COALESCE(SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ta.start_at, ta.end_at)) / 60, 0) AS totalHours, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS totalEarnings, COUNT(p.id) AS paidCount, AVG(l.price) AS avgLessonPrice FROM payment p JOIN booking b ON p.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND p.paid_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY yearMonth DESC
